name: harness-self-improvement
description: SIPS: Self Improvement Plugin System home-base with delegation, lifecycle hooks, commands, and MCP control plane.

interface.shortDescription: Shared self-improvement control plane for Codex and other harnesses.
interface.longDescription: SIPS, the Self Improvement Plugin System, provides a portable home-base MCP for Codex, NCode, and future harnesses. It surfaces status, verification, task routing, repo mapping, context scanning, recall, and goal inspection while keeping host-specific hook, command, and agent surfaces as adapters.
